items.caption: A stylized illustration of a nautical knot, specifically a noose knot, set against a solid blue background. the knot is depicted in a simple, hand-drawn style with white lines, and it is centered in the frame. below the knot, there is a white banner with the word "noose" written in a bold, sans-serif font. the overall style of the image is graphic and appears to be designed for use as a logo or an emblem, possibly for a maritime or nautical theme.
